title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Shree Cement

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Shree Cement
jsonLd.description:
We at Shree Cement are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Shree Cement:
Shree Cement is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shree Cement!
